keyEvents.text: Omari Sterling-James (St. Kitts And Nevis) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Goal!  Costa Rica 1, St. Kitts And Nevis 0. Orlando Galo (Costa Rica) header from the left side of the six yard box to the bottom left corner. Assisted by Jefferson Brenes with a cross.
Jameel Ible (St. Kitts And Nevis) is shown the yellow card.
First Half ends, Costa Rica 1, St. Kitts And Nevis 0.
Second Half begins Costa Rica 1, St. Kitts And Nevis 0.
Goal!  Costa Rica 2, St. Kitts And Nevis 0. Orlando Galo (Costa Rica) left footed shot from outside the box to the bottom left corner. Assisted by Manfred Ugalde.
Substitution, St. Kitts And Nevis. Harrison Panayiotou replaces Kimaree Rogers.
Jefferson Brenes (Costa Rica) is shown the yellow card.
Lois Maynard (St. Kitts And Nevis) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Substitution, Costa Rica. Brandon Aguilera replaces Jefferson Brenes.
Substitution, Costa Rica. Josimar Alcócer replaces Warren Madrigal.
Substitution, St. Kitts And Nevis. Yohannes Mitchum replaces Tyquan Terrell.
Substitution, St. Kitts And Nevis. Diego Edwards replaces Romaine Sawyers.
Substitution, St. Kitts And Nevis. G'Vaune Amory replaces Tyrese Shade.
Substitution, Costa Rica. Gerald Taylor replaces Haxzel Quirós.
Substitution, Costa Rica. Andy Rojas replaces Álvaro Zamora.
Substitution, Costa Rica. Joel Campbell replaces Manfred Ugalde.
Goal!  Costa Rica 3, St. Kitts And Nevis 0. Josimar Alcócer (Costa Rica) right footed shot from the centre of the box to the centre of the goal.
Goal!  Costa Rica 4, St. Kitts And Nevis 0. Andy Rojas (Costa Rica) right footed shot from the centre of the box to the bottom right corner. Assisted by Joel Campbell.
Substitution, St. Kitts And Nevis. Nequan Browne replaces Omari Sterling-James.
Second Half ends, Costa Rica 4, St. Kitts And Nevis 0.
